title: struthiopteris rufa
intro: Struthiopteris rufa, also known as the red fern, is a type of fern native to the mountainous regions of Japan and Korea. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Struthiopteris rufa include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating pain, making it a popular remedy for various ailments. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used in folk medicine to promote overall well-being.
